body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 58 — paragraph 10 (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

The advisory forum shall prepare an annual report of its activities. That report shall be made publicly available.
parliament_text: The advisory forum shall prepare an annual report of its activities. That report shall be made publicly available.
